title: Indore: Man 'kills' wife, then dies by suicide; sons find bodies after returning home
description: A shocking incident unfolded in Indore's Pardeshipura where a couple was found dead, suspected to be a murder-suicide. Financial distress is believed to be the motive. The sons returned home to find their father hanging and mother deceased, with signs of a struggle. Police are investigating the circumstances surrounding this tragic event.

title: UP teen approaches police to stop partially paralysed father’s 7th marriage
description: A 17-year-old boy in Azamgarh reported his 55-year-old father to the police after being beaten for opposing his seventh marriage. The father, Amarjeet Maurya, has a history of failed marriages, with previous wives leaving due to his refusal to transfer land. The son intervened to protect their ancestral property from further debt incurred for his father's marital pursuits.

Rs 23 lakh penalty for maternity leave? Bombay high court steps in
description: The Bombay High Court ruled that maternity leave is not a service break and cannot be penalized under compulsory service bonds for medical professionals. Upholding a dental surgeon's plea, the court declared that contractual obligations cannot override a woman's fundamental right to motherhood and statutory maternity benefits, ensuring career and family balance.
